title: 'Pro-worker AI,' streaming fatalities, and other fascinating new economic studies
description: From artificial intelligence to fatalities from music streaming to the effects of immigrants on elderly health care, the Planet Money newsletter rounds up some interesting new economic studies.
content: Economists are constantly churning out fascinating research, and as much as we try at Planet Money, there's a lot of stuff we don't cover. So, periodically, we like to do a little round-up of interesting economic papers we've come across and share it... [11988 chars]

title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - China Embraces AI Revolution to Create New Opportunities
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing. Its impact is far-reaching, transforming industries, reshaping economies, and influencing the way we navigate daily life.

title: How Technology Is Transforming the Waste and Recycling Industry
description: Across cities and supply chains, waste is becoming data, and recyclng is evolving into a responsive, technology driven system. Sensors, artificial intelligence, and modern processing lines are changing how materials are collected, sorted, verified, and sold. These tools are not only improving efficiency. title: These diseases were thought to be incurable. Now AI is unlocking new treatments

title: France's Strategic Move in AI & Energy: A Data-Driven Future
description: French President Emmanuel Macron announced plans to leverage France's energy efficiency, especially its nuclear power, to open data centers supporting artificial intelligence. Last year, France exported 90 terawatt-hours of decarbonized electricity, demonstrating its capability to build computing capacity at the World Nuclear Energy summit.
